subcodes.first_line: O favored and accepted servant of the Truth! What shall I write, when my heart is in the utmost state of attraction and my spirit in the heights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده مقبل مقبول حق چه نویسم که قلب در نهایت انجذابست و روح در نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God
